title: Debug and fix app functionality issues

requirements.text: Investigate and fix any runtime errors or console errors preventing the app from functioning correctly, including authentication flow issues, data fetching failures, or component rendering problems

quotes: the app is not working properly so give me correct

acceptanceCriteria: App loads without console errors
Authentication flow completes successfully
Dashboard displays correctly for authenticated users
All navigation links work properly
Data queries execute without failures

requirements.text: Verify that the Internet Identity authentication integration is working correctly and users can successfully log in and out
acceptanceCriteria: Login button triggers Internet Identity authentication flow
User identity is persisted correctly after login
Logout clears user session and redirects appropriately
useInternetIdentity hook returns correct authentication state

requirements.text: Ensure the backend actor initialization and canister communication is functioning properly with correct canister IDs and agent configuration
acceptanceCriteria: Backend canister is reachable from frontend
Actor methods can be called successfully
Proper error handling for network failures
Access control initialization works with admin token

requirements.text: Fix any broken routing or navigation issues preventing users from accessing dashboard, profile, admin panel, or job details pages
acceptanceCriteria: All routes in App.tsx resolve correctly
Navigation between pages works without errors
URL parameters are parsed correctly
Back/forward browser navigation functions properly

requirements.text: Validate that all React Query hooks are properly configured and data fetching operations complete successfully without infinite loops or stale data issues
acceptanceCriteria: useQueries hooks fetch data correctly
Query invalidation works after mutations
Loading and error states display appropriately
No infinite refetch loops occur

requirements.text: Check and fix any TypeScript compilation errors or type mismatches that may be causing runtime failures
acceptanceCriteria: No TypeScript errors in build output
All imports resolve correctly
Type definitions match actual data structures
No 'any' types masking runtime errors

constraints: Do not change the backend architecture from single-actor pattern
Preserve existing Internet Identity authentication implementation
Maintain compatibility with existing data structures in backend/main.mo
Do not modify immutable frontend paths: useInternetIdentity.ts, useActor.ts, main.tsx, components/ui
nonGoals: Redesigning the UI or visual theme
Optimizing performance beyond fixing critical issues
